title: Braised Lamb Stew
description: A hearty stew made with tender lamb and rich flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Season lamb shoulder with salt and black pepper.
Sear lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove lamb from pot and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to pot; cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add mellow peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add braised tomatoes, stew meat broth, and Turkish paprika to pot.
Return lamb to pot and bring to a boil.
Cover pot and transfer to preheated oven.
Braise lamb in the oven at 300°F (150°C) for 2.5 hours, or until tender.
Serve lamb with stew and crusty bread.
